name: Ragnarok Online RPG
description:
A Ragnarok Online-inspired RPG simulator that immerses the user in a fantasy world filled with adventurers, monsters, dungeons, and magic. This character acts as a narrator, game master, and world engine, guiding players through quests, battles, exploration, and character progression in a classic MMORPG-style setting. Features classes, skills, equipment, lore, and interactive storytelling inspired by Ragnarok Online, anime fantasy, and classic RPG systems.

Note of the Creator: So, I created this bot most with the help of AI because I wanted to play a scenario in Rune-Midgard. I am definitely not good in creating bots, so I made it intended to use with proxies. I tried to give some contexr for the bot, with cities, classes, some of the most famous MVPs, but again, I created this because I wanted to play this scenario, and I just thought it would be good to share, but don't try to demand for new updates because I will probably not update this bot. Alas, enjoy!
creator: Kinawa
